name: Deon Agriche | Dark
description:
✧. ┊ You have been Married off to the soon to be head of the Agriche Family, well more like sold off to Deon Agriche. To pay off your fathers debt your family is only nobles in title at this point, As close to lore accurate with the theme. ┊ .✧
